data.content:
Shipment complete

Merged reviewed branch codex/4b66-stale-beats-overview to main by fast-forwarding main to da0b66f7, then pushed origin main. Remote verification:
- origin/main now resolves to da0b66f762c05d857762781497c38487a3a7a846.
- GitHub Actions CI run 25358137696 completed successfully. It emitted coverage-regression annotations as warnings, not failures.
- GitHub Actions Coverage Badge run 25358137503 completed successfully.

Local note: the post-merge Knots sync hook reported an active-lease sync error after the fast-forward merge, but git status is clean and main is synchronized with origin/main after the push.
